caption:
I look at Google Business Profiles around Sault Ste. Marie every week, and most of them are half-empty.

The business is real. The work is good. But the profile is missing the free fields that tell Google to show it.

Here are 4 I check on every client. None of them cost a thing, and you can do all 4 this week.

Swipe through. Fix 3 is the one almost everyone leaves blank.

How complete is your profile right now? Drop a comment and I'll point you to the weakest spot.
